source.title: Evaluating AI agents: Real-world lessons from building agentic systems at Amazon
source.publisher: Amazon Web Services (AWS Machine Learning Blog)

extraction.method: Python standard-library HTMLParser over the server-rendered section[property=articleBody] element
extraction.scope: Full article body, including headings, prose, lists, source links, image references, conclusion, and author biographies; scripts, navigation, sharing controls, and site chrome excluded
verified_sections: AI agent evaluation framework in Amazon
Evaluating real-world agent systems used by Amazon
Evaluating tool-use in the Amazon shopping assistant AI agent
Evaluating user intent detection in the Amazon customer service AI agent
extraction.notes: The extracted source was inspected at the beginning, middle, and end. The framework, metric inventory, three production examples, lessons, conclusion, and all four author biographies are present. Nested list indentation and visual figure content are flattened, while list text, image alt text, image URLs, and links are retained. This artifact is source evidence, not a deep review.
